examples.description: The defaults a new datasource starts with: no authentication, no TLS overrides, no streaming, no trace-to-X mappings. Only root.url needs to be filled in to get a working datasource pointed at a Tempo server on localhost:3200.

basicAuth.description: Authenticate with a Tempo that requires HTTP Basic. Both basicAuth and basicAuthUser live at the datasource root; only basicAuthPassword is secret. Basic auth is also injected as gRPC per-RPC credentials (pkg/tempo/grpc.go:178-184).

fullObservability.summary: Full observability wiring (trace ↔ logs / metrics / profiles / service graph)
fullObservability.description: Tempo wired to Loki (logs), Prometheus (metrics + service graph), and Pyroscope (profiles). Uses the v2 tracesToLogs shape; nodeGraph, spanBar='Duration', and Tempo search are enabled.

legacyTracesToLogs.description: A datasource stored before the v2 shape landed. `getTraceToLogsOptions` transforms tracesToLogs → tracesToLogsV2 at editor load; the next save wipes tracesToLogs entirely. Kept as an example so provisioning tooling knows the shape is still round-trippable.

noAuth.description: A public or network-isolated Tempo with no HTTP-level auth. Node graph is enabled for a richer trace view.

oauthForward.description: Forward the signed-in user's upstream OAuth identity to Tempo. The editor writes only jsonData.oauthPassThru; there is no accompanying secret.

streaming.description: TraceQL search and metrics streaming both enabled. Requires Tempo >= 2.7.0 (search alone needs 2.2.0). CheckHealth (pkg/tempo/tempo.go:150-208) probes the gRPC streaming endpoint when streamingEnabled.search is true.

tlsMutualAuth.description: Tempo requiring mTLS. jsonData.tlsAuth=true triggers the SDK to build a client-authenticated transport using serverName plus the PEM-encoded client cert and key in secureJsonData; the same TLS config is picked up by the gRPC client (pkg/tempo/grpc.go:186-197).

secureJsonData.tlsClientKey:
-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
...
-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----

tlsSelfSignedCA.description: Tempo behind a private CA. jsonData.tlsAuthWithCACert=true tells the SDK to verify the server certificate against the PEM-encoded CA in secureJsonData.tlsCACert.

traceQLSearchAndTraceID.summary: TraceQL search tuning and TraceID time-range shifts
traceQLSearchAndTraceID.description: TraceQL search filters seeded, tag time-range extended to 3 hours, tag limit raised to 10000, and TraceID queries time-shifted so long-running traces fall inside the search window.
